title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers video explaining containers, Docker, and Amazon ECS orchestration. Covers the problem containers solve, Docker image building, ECS management approaches (EC2 vs Fargate), and includes a real-world shopping app example with auto-scaling.
writeup: This AWS Developers video walks through containers, Docker, and orchestration with Amazon ECS. It explains the problem containers solve, how Docker images are built, and the two ECS management approaches: running on EC2 versus Fargate. A shopping app example demonstrates ECS in practice, including auto-scaling. The material matters for understanding how containerized workloads are packaged and run on AWS without managing the underlying scaling manually.
